# terrible_community_general_opendj_backendprop (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backend` (String) The name of the backend on which the property needs to be updated.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `hostname` (String) The hostname of the OpenDJ server.
- `name` (String) The configuration setting to update.
- `port` (String) The Admin port on which the OpenDJ instance is available.
- `value` (String) The value for the configuration item.

### Optional

- `opendj_bindir` (String) The path to the bin directory of OpenDJ.
- `password` (String) The password for `username`. Either `password` or `passwordfile` is needed.
- `passwordfile` (String) Location to the password file which holds the password for `username`. Either `password` or `passwordfile` is needed.
- `state` (String) If configuration needs to be added/updated.
- `username` (String) The username to connect with.
